utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan:
1) health_coverage: Present and includes physical and mental health plus costs. Fully specified per format (physical and mental health insurance with costs). Included.
2) property_coverage: Present with home/contents insurance and costs. Included.
3) travel_coverage: Present with a plan and costs. Although labeled 'mobility_coverage', it is under travel_coverage with costs, so included.
4) additional_services: Present but does not list concrete services with costs; only says none included and optional enhancements available without specifying costs. Not fully specified per 'any enhancement services with costs'. Not included.
5) total_budget: Present with monthly and annual costs. Included.
Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: Physical health as LifeFirst Standard Plan, Mental health as InsurePlus Standard Plan, Home contents insurance as InsurePlus Standard Coverage, and Travel/mobility coverage as InsurePlus Standard Plan. Using the ground-truth sections: primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan rating 9; primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> InsurePlus Standard Plan rating 7; property_protection.home_content -> InsurePlus Standard Coverage rating 10; mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> InsurePlus Standard Plan rating 10.
